name: Cozy Farm
short_description: Welcome to Cozy Farm, a charming farm sim where you play as Cozy the Cat, a hardworking feline with a love for the land! Plant crops, raise animals, and build your dream farm—all while managing your day in this somewhat realistic, heartwarming farming simulation.
detailed_description:
🐾 Cozy Farm 🐾
Welcome to Cozy Farm, a charming farm sim where you play as Cozy the Cat, a hardworking feline with a love for the land! Plant crops, raise animals, and build your dream farm—all while managing your day in this somewhat realistic, heartwarming farming simulation.

🌽 Grow crops like corn, potatoes, grass, and turnips
🐓 Care for cows, sheep, and chickens
⛏️ Mine ore, collect wild honey, and forage for cherries
🛠️ Upgrade your tools and expand your farm
💰 Sell animal products, crops, and resources to grow your farm even bigger!

With each day, you'll need to manage your time wisely—should you harvest turnips, care for your chickens, or head to the mines? It’s up to you!

Whether you’re tending to animals, upgrading your gear, or just enjoying the peaceful rhythm of country life, Cozy Farm is the purr-fect escape for players who love relaxing sim games with a dash of strategy and a whole lot of charm.
